name: email-deliverability-engineering
description: Email deliverability & authentication team — 2 agents (deliverability-architect, email-auth-engineer) for getting email to the inbox and keeping it there: SPF (RFC 7208), DKIM (RFC 6376), DMARC (RFC 7489) alignment + enforcement, BIMI, MTA-STS + TLS-RPT (RFC 8461/8460), the Google/Yahoo 2024 bulk-sender requirements (DMARC, one-click List-Unsubscribe, <=0.3% complaint rate), domain/IP reputation, list hygiene, bounce + complaint feedback loops, and warmup. The ENGINEERING of sending infrastructure + authentication + reputation — not campaign strategy/content (marketing-operations) and not DNS provisioning (devops-cicd/cloud). 2 skills (email-auth-audit, deliverability-incident-triage), a cited knowledge bank (auth standards + the 2024 sender rules + a reputation-recovery decision tree), best-practices. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
